notes: Data sourced from 9 TUV NORD plastic-product certificates (cert ref 07/203/1326/Z/8124074649/25/KSP/*, test report MTEK23025-314 / 8124074649-T0x), digitally signed by Biel Andreas on 2025-12-23. Each PAS 13 certificate publishes absorbed-energy per impact zone (Zone 1/3 = end bays, Zone 2 = centre span, Zone 4 = low-level protection). The recorded impactRating is the minimum certified joule value across all tested zones/variants for that family - the conservative headline rating that holds for impact anywhere along the rated section. This supersedes any conflicting DB value. The T13 Rack Guard certificate is under DIN EN 15512/15635 (rack protection) and publishes no joule rating, so it only updates the test-method field.

patches.familyName: RackGuard - Multiple height and profile sizes
patches.impactRatingRaw: No joule published. Certified to DIN EN 15512:2010-09 Ch.6.4.1 shock loads + DIN EN 15635:2009-08 Ch.9.5.1 column/bracing damage assessment
patches.notes: Sourced from 8124074649-T13_Certificate-EN-_A-Safe_RackGuard.pdf (TUV NORD cert 07/203/1326/Z/8124074649/25/KSP/13, report MTEK23025-314 / 8124074649-T13, signed 2025-12-23). Not a PAS 13 cert - rack-protection EN standard. Updates pas13TestMethod only; no joule to set.
